name: LAVA Medtech Acquisition Corp. Unit
summary: LAVA Medtech Acquisition Corp. Unit consists of one share of Class A common stock and one-third of one redeemable warrant. Each whole warrant entitles the holder to purchase one share of Class A common stock at a price of $11.50 per share. LAVA Medtech Acquisition Corp. is a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC).
